title: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
summary: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.
title_es: Se aprueba acuerdo de derechos de autor de $1.5B de Anthropic
bajada: Un tribunal aprobó el acuerdo de copyright de Anthropic por $1.5 mil millones, aunque no resuelve el debate más amplio sobre el uso de obras protegidas en entrenamiento de IA. La decisión sienta precedente pero deja preguntas regulatorias abiertas.
bajada_en: A court approved Anthropic's $1.5 billion copyright settlement, though it doesn't resolve broader questions about copyrighted works in AI training. The decision sets precedent but leaves regulatory questions open.

title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
summary: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
title_es: OpenAI publica lecciones sobre seguridad en modelos de largo horizonte
bajada: OpenAI compartió insights sobre riesgos de seguridad y salvaguardas al desplegar modelos de IA con ejecución prolongada. El documento detalla fallos observados y cómo la implementación iterativa mejora la alineación en sistemas complejos.
bajada_en: OpenAI shared insights on safety risks and safeguards when deploying long-running AI models. The document details observed failures and how iterative deployment improves alignment in complex systems.

title: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
summary: From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.
title_es: NVIDIA avanza en IA agentica y simulación física en SIGGRAPH
bajada: NVIDIA presentó avances en modelos abiertos e integración de IA con gráficos en tiempo real para aplicaciones en creación de contenido y robótica. Los desarrollos combinan capacidades de simulación con IA para mejorar flujos de trabajo profesionales.
bajada_en: NVIDIA showcased advances in open models and real-time AI-graphics integration for content creation and robotics. The developments combine simulation capabilities with AI to enhance professional workflows.

title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
summary: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.
title_es: Google desarrolla chip IA especializado para mejorar eficiencia de Gemini
bajada: Alphabet está trabajando en un chip personalizado para ejecutar modelos Gemini más eficientemente. El movimiento refleja la estrategia de las grandes tech de verticalizarse en hardware para IA.
bajada_en: Alphabet is developing a custom chip to run Gemini models more efficiently. The move reflects big tech's strategy to vertically integrate AI hardware.

title: Gritt exits stealth with $32 million for robots to build solar plants — then, everything else
summary: Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plans to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites.
title_es: Gritt sale del sigilo con $34M para robotizar construcción solar
bajada: Gritt recaudó $34 millones para automatizar tareas complejas en obra civil, comenzando con plantas de energía solar. La startup representa el crecimiento de aplicaciones de IA y robótica en industrias tradicionales.
bajada_en: Gritt raised $34 million to automate complex construction tasks, starting with solar plants. The startup represents growing AI and robotics applications in traditional industries.

title: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
summary: Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June
title_es: Más del 50% de música diaria en Deezer es generada por IA
bajada: Deezer reportó que más de 90,000 tracks generados por IA se suben diariamente, representando más del 50% de contenido nuevo. El fenómeno plantea desafíos sobre derechos de autor y curaduría en plataformas musicales.
bajada_en: Deezer reported over 90,000 AI-generated tracks uploaded daily, representing more than 50% of new content. The phenomenon raises copyright and curation challenges for music platforms.

title: Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework
summary:
arXiv:2607.16195v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We identify a structured confound in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Pairwise preference labels are intended to reflect the compared outputs, but they may also reflect the rater's state during annotation. Under sustained stressful or distressing conditions, raters' preferences may shift over time. As a result, preference data can encode rater state alongside judgments about response quality. These shifts differ from ordinary disagreement or random label noise. They are state dependent, can be shared across annotators working under similar conditions, and can propagate through reward modeling and policy optimization. We therefore propose rater state shift as a plausible and testable source of structured bias in RLHF preference data. This paper develops a hypothesis and an audit framework for studying this source of bias. We define rater state shift, rater state confound, and correlated rater state bias. We also define survival level emotional authenticity as a measurable response pattern using lexical, pragmatic, discourse, and safety related features. We analyze how correlated rater state bias can survive aggregation and enter learned reward signals. We derive five falsifiable predictions and effect size thresholds for an initial audit. Finally, we present an audit protocol and pilot study plan that can be applied to publicly available instruction tuned models. We do not infer the training history of any specific deployed model. Our goal is to isolate a plausible and testable source of structured bias in RLHF preference data.
title_es: Sesgo del anotador en datos RLHF: nuevo marco de auditoría
bajada: Investigadores identifican cómo el estado emocional de anotadores durante labeling afecta RLHF, introduciendo sesgo estructurado en datos de preferencia. El paper propone un framework para auditar este tipo de confusor.
bajada_en: Researchers identify how annotators' emotional state during labeling affects RLHF, introducing structured bias in preference data. The paper proposes a framework to audit this confounder.

title: PlanFlip: Attacking Multi-Agent LLM Systems via Planning-Phase Prompt Injection
summary:
arXiv:2607.16199v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems increasingly rely on a Planner to decompose goals into sub-task sequences that downstream Executor and Critic agents execute and audit. We identify the planning phase as a critical attack surface: a single injection into the Planner's context achieves cascade amplification, corrupting all downstream sub-tasks simultaneously. We introduce PlanFlip, a framework comprising four planning-phase prompt injection attacks -- GoalSubstitution (PF-1), PriorityInversion (PF-2), ContextPollution (PF-3), and RoleConfusion (PF-4) -- each disguised as plausible tool outputs to evade keyword filters. Evaluating nine frontier LLMs across 3,479 episodes, we uncover three findings: (1) capability amplifies vulnerability -- GPT-5 achieves the highest attack success rate (ASR = 0.68), contradicting the assumption that stronger models are inherently more secure; (2) homogeneous pipelines exhibit a correlated-agent blind spot -- GPT-4o and Llama-3.3-70B show ASR near 0 yet Stealth = 1.00 and StepShift > 0, with attacks restructuring plans while the same-backbone Critic reports alignment (two independent judges confirm -0.20 to -0.32 semantic deviation, r = 0.943); (3) reasoning-augmented models resist injections -- DeepSeek-R1 achieves StepShift = 0.00 across all attacks. We propose GoalAnchorCheck (D1) and CrossAgentConsensus (D2), achieving detection rates up to 1.00 and outperforming same-backbone baselines in 15 of 16 cells. Our key insight: heterogeneous model diversity is a security prerequisite for multi-agent systems; redundancy within a homogeneous backbone provides no protection against planning-phase attacks.
title_es: PlanFlip: ataque a sistemas multi-agente LLM vía inyección
bajada: Un estudio expone vulnerabilidades críticas en sistemas multi-agente donde inyección en la fase de planning corrompe todas las subtareas posteriores. Los modelos más potentes (GPT-5) muestran mayores tasas de éxito de ataque.
bajada_en: A study exposes critical vulnerabilities in multi-agent systems where planning-phase injection corrupts all downstream subtasks. Stronger models (GPT-5) show higher attack success rates.

title: Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
title_es: Hugging Face lanza Grabette para registro de datos de robótica
bajada: Grabette es un sistema abierto para capturar datos de manipulación robótica, facilitando la creación de datasets para entrenar modelos de robótica. Representa un paso importante en la estandarización de datos para IA robótica.
bajada_en: Grabette is an open system for capturing robot manipulation data, enabling dataset creation for robotics model training. It represents an important step in standardizing data for robotic AI.

title: Introducing Cosmos 3 Edge
title_es: NVIDIA lanza Cosmos 3 Edge para visión por computadora eficiente
bajada: Cosmos 3 Edge es un modelo optimizado para tareas de visión por computadora en dispositivos edge. El lanzamiento busca democratizar capacidades avanzadas de visión sin requerir infraestructura computacional pesada.
bajada_en: Cosmos 3 Edge is an optimized model for computer vision tasks on edge devices. The launch aims to democratize advanced vision capabilities without requiring heavy computational infrastructure.

title: Jul 20, 2026AnnouncementsApply for Anthropic’s AI for Science rare disease research grants
summary: Announcements Apply for Anthropic’s AI for Science rare disease research grants Jul 20, 2026 Last spring, we announced Anthropic’s AI for Science program , an initiative designed to accelerate scientific research and discovery through access to our API. Since launching, we have supported researchers working on a variety of high-impact projects, ranging from drug repurposing to quantum simulation. Throughout this initiative, we have found that projects are more generative when multiple AI for Science grantees are working on related questions and exchanging tips. So we now plan to launch thematic calls for projects within the broader AI for Science program. Today, we are sharing a focused call for applications centered specifically on rare genetic diseases. Accepted applicants will receive up to $50,000 in Claude credits over six months, with the goal of building a community of researchers looking into how AI can reshape our understanding of rare disease. This program has two tracks: one for scientists doing basic research, and another for early-stage biotechs working on speeding up clinical development for rare diseases. Rare disease research is an area where knowledge of fundamental science is limited. In aggregate, rare diseases are among the most prevalent conditions on the planet (an estimated 400 million people live with one of more than 7,000 rare diseases ). 1 But these conditions are scattered across small populations, making it challenging for clinicians to build patient registries, identify promising therapeutic targets, and design clinical trials. Moreover, rare diseases are typically characterized by their unique features (such as a specific genetic variation or combination of symptoms) that are often studied in isolation, making it nearly impossible to spot mechanisms shared across diseases. Finally, rare diseases face a challenge endemic to all drug development: the time it takes to move promising drug candidates into patient trials. We think AI can hel
title_es: Anthropic abre convocatoria para investigación de enfermedades raras con IA
bajada: Anthropic lanza una convocatoria específica dentro su programa AI for Science con hasta $50,000 en créditos Claude para proyectos sobre enfermedades genéticas raras. Busca crear comunidad de investigadores aplicando IA a problemas biomédicos de alto impacto.
bajada_en: Anthropic launches a targeted call within its AI for Science program offering up to $50,000 in Claude credits for rare genetic disease projects. It aims to build a research community applying AI to high-impact biomedical problems.

title: Bristol Myers Squibb Building Life Science Industry’s Most Advanced AI Factory on NVIDIA Vera Rubin
summary: Erin Davis calls it the “SuperDuperPOD.” That’s two things in one name: pharmaceutical giant Bristol Myers Squibb (BMS) already runs one of the largest AI clusters in life sciences, with serious results to show for it. And they’re doubling down. BMS announced today it is deploying its second NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD, this one built on […]
title_es: Bristol Myers Squibb despliega segunda IA Factory en infraestructura NVIDIA
bajada: BMS duplica su capacidad de IA con un segundo DGX SuperPOD basado en NVIDIA Vera Rubin para investigación farmacéutica. El movimiento demuestra cómo big pharma intensifica inversión en IA para acelerar descubrimientos.
bajada_en: Bristol Myers Squibb doubles its AI capacity with a second DGX SuperPOD on NVIDIA Vera Rubin for pharmaceutical research. The move shows big pharma intensifying AI investment to accelerate discoveries.

title: The Army Is Burning Through Its AI Tokens
summary: Members of the Army received an email informing them that they were rapidly depleting their AI tokens, and needed to limit use.
title_es: El Ejército estadounidense se queda sin tokens de IA
bajada: Militares recibieron alertas sobre agotamiento rápido de sus tokens de acceso a IA, debiendo limitar uso. El incidente refleja la creciente demanda de IA dentro instituciones gubernamentales y limitaciones de recursos.
bajada_en: Military personnel received alerts about rapid AI token depletion, forcing usage limits. The incident reflects growing AI demand within government institutions and resource constraints.

title: Advancing next-gen AI with materials science innovation
summary: The conversation about AI often centers on algorithms, computing power, or huge investments in new semiconductor fabrication plants and hyperscale data centers. But beneath each of these advances is another layer of innovation that makes them possible: advanced materials. Every new generation of AI technology demands more processing power, more memory, greater energy efficiency, and…
title_es: Innovación en materiales avanza la próxima generación de IA
bajada: Un análisis examina cómo avances en ciencia de materiales subyacen a mejoras en capacidad computacional, memoria y eficiencia energética de sistemas IA. El enfoque destaca un aspecto frecuentemente invisible pero crítico de la infraestructura IA.
bajada_en: An analysis examines how materials science advances underpin improvements in AI computing power, memory, and energy efficiency. The focus highlights a frequently invisible but critical aspect of AI infrastructure.

title: America needs to stop getting shocked by Chinese AI
summary: Last week, two Chinese AI companies unveiled models they say can credibly compete with the best systems from OpenAI and Anthropic. The response was swift and predictable. Markets wobbled, commentators declared Silicon Valley shooketh, and policymakers reached for the familiar language of arms races and wake-up calls. In one headline, The Associated Press said a […]
title_es: China no es sorpresa: por qué occidente debe repensar la IA
bajada: Un análisis argumenta que los avances recientes de IA china no deberían ser tratados como shock, sino como parte de competencia esperada. Cuestiona la retórica de carreras armamentistas como respuesta efectiva a innovación global.
bajada_en: An analysis argues recent Chinese AI advances shouldn't be treated as shocks but expected competition. It questions arms-race rhetoric as an effective response to global innovation.
